title: Variant Fletching Tables
description: Fletching tables in all wood types
body:
Embark on an enchanting journey through the world of arrows and feathers with Variant Fletching Tables!

This delightful mod sprinkles a touch of magic on the humble Fletching Table, transforming it into a kaleidoscope of wooden wonders.

Dive into the vibrant hues of the vanilla palette or venture beyond into a forest of modded wood styles.

Each Fletching Table is a masterpiece, carefully crafted to match the aesthetic wonders of different woods.

From the rustic charm of Oak to the mystical allure of modded woods, your fletching fantasies know no bounds.

But it's not just about looks – these Fletching Tables are as functional as they are stylish!

Cooperate with Fletcher villagers and watch as they skillfully fashion arrows with unparalleled precision.

Your archery arsenal is about to get a makeover, and the fletching process has never been this charming.

Whether you're a master archer or a curious adventurer, Variant Fletching Tables invites you to explore the artistry of fletching in a world where every table tells a unique tale.

Unleash your creativity, feather your arrows with flair, and let the fletching festivities begin! 🏹

 

 

 

Variant Fletching Tables adds a new Fletching Tables for each vanilla Plank type.

  • All textures have been compressed (without any negative impact) to keep the mod file size to an absolute minimum.
  • All textures are manually created using the hex colours from the appropriate planks to ensure they look correct.
  • Un-crafting for all variants back to vanilla has been included in case of any issues.
  • Vanilla Fletching Table renamed to Birch and recoloured slightly to better fit the Birch wood type.
